title: Record: LoRA-TTT chunk size 36 — val_bpb 1.06900 (3-seed mean)
author: renqianluo
novel_contributions: Reduced TTT chunk size from 48 to 36, improving the 3-seed mean val_bpb
Observed sharp, non-monotonic dependence of LoRA-TTT performance on chunk size
Showed that rank=96 combined with chunk size 36 did not compound improvements
